# Marzi Life Blog

> AEO-optimized content for Marzi — offline social events for people above 55 in Bangalore and Mumbai. Each page is a snippet-ready answer aligned to a schema.org type (FAQPage, HowTo, Article, BlogPosting).

## About

- Brand: Marzi (https://marzi.life)
- Format: 20+ themed offline social events per month, group size 20–60
- Cities: Bangalore, Mumbai
- Pricing: Pay-per-event (no subscription)

## How-To Guides

- [Find 55+ Friends: 20+ Offline Themed Events Monthly with Marzi](https://marziblogs.web.app/marzi-find-friends-after-retirement-in-india): Discover how to find friends after retirement in Bangalore & Mumbai. Marzi offers 20+ unique offline, themed events monthly for people above 55, with no subscription.

No subscription, pay per event for real connections.
